What I Got Wrong: Assumed heartbeat interval is 60 minutes by default
Correct Answer: Interval is set in OpenClaw config and commonly 30 minutes

What I Got Wrong: Left last_heartbeat_started_at as never after initialization
Correct Answer: Should set both start and review to current UTC ISO 8601 Z

What I Got Wrong: Placed preferences under Rules in memory.md
Correct Answer: Preferences must be under Preferences section and Rules should list triggers and obligations only
